opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help my husband — a tearing pain ripped through the left side of his belly out of nowhere, and then he nearly passed out passing a whole bowl full of bright red blood. He's grey, sweaty and too weak to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly about four hours ago and the bleeding and weakness are frightening us — he can't get up off the floor.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago, completely out of the blue
symptom_narrative.character: a sudden severe tearing, cramping pain low down on the left side of his belly, and within the first hour a huge urgent gush of bright red bloody diarrhoea
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain he's ever had, and he says he felt like he was going to black out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down on the left side of his tummy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the pain came first and then the bloody diarrhoea followed straight after
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — lying still is the only way he can bear it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit up or stand makes him feel faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he's pale, clammy and drained, and feels dizzy whenever he moves
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he's stuck on the floor, can't stand, completely wiped out

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: heart disease — he had a heart bypass operation about 5 years ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: sees a heart specialist and takes blood pressure tablets

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure treated with tablets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older man, lives with his wife who is with him and made the call; by mistake he took a double dose of his blood pressure tablet yesterday and felt very light-headed and washed out for a while afterwards

objective_data_offered.value: he passed a large volume of bright red bloody diarrhoea into a bowl within the first hour, and there are soiled garments in the bathroom from how sudden and heavy it was
he looks grey and pale with sweaty clammy skin, lying on the floor unable to get up
he nearly fainted when the bleeding happened and feels like he'll black out every time he tries to sit up or stand
wife reports he took a double dose of his blood pressure tablet by mistake yesterday and was very light-headed for a while afterwards
